title: Complete gruai init CLI with team generation and scaffolding
description: Extend cli/commands/init.ts with agent-registry generation, personality templates, skill docs copying, CLAUDE.md, gruai.config.json, update command, path resolution fix

scope.in: Extend init.ts, add update command, fix path resolution, generate agent-registry.json with random names, scaffold all missing items, copy skill docs/ subdirectories
scope.out: Do not modify pipeline doc content. Update v1 is overwrite-with-backup only.

dod.criterion: gruai init scaffolds complete project: .claude/agents/, agent-registry.json, skills with docs/, .context/ tree, CLAUDE.md, gruai.config.json
Path resolution works from both tsx dev and compiled dist-cli/
gruai update command backs up and overwrites framework files
Init asks only project name, scaffolds all roles by default

tasks.title: Fix path resolution for npm-installed mode

dod.criterion: findPackageRoot() walks up from __dirname to find package.json
REPO_ROOT, TEMPLATES_DIR, registryPath all derive from findPackageRoot()
init still works via tsx from repo root
Clear error if package root not found

tasks.title: Generate agent-registry.json and personality files from role templates

dod.criterion: init generates .claude/agent-registry.json with role-based entries
Each agent gets randomly generated first+last name from curated pools
Personality .md files generated from role templates with injected names
At least 7 role templates exist: CTO, COO, CPO, CMO, backend, frontend, fullstack

tasks.title: Generate CLAUDE.md and gruai.config.json during init

dod.criterion: init generates CLAUDE.md from template with project name and agent roster
init generates gruai.config.json with name, version, agents, skills
CLAUDE.md includes context tree structure and key conventions

tasks.title: Copy skill docs/ subdirectories during scaffolding

dod.criterion: scaffoldSkills() recursively copies docs/ subdirectory
directive skill scaffolded with full docs/ tree
At least 4 new templates: goal.json, backlog.json, directive.json, directive.md

tasks.title: Add gruai update command with backup-and-overwrite strategy

dod.criterion: gruai update command exists and wired in cli/index.ts
Backs up existing framework files to .gruai-backup/{timestamp}/
Updates skill files and re-renders CLAUDE.md from template
Does NOT overwrite .context/ tree or agent-registry.json names

tasks.title: Reduce init to minimal questions and clean up output

dod.criterion: Interactive init asks only project name (when not provided via --name)
All agent roles scaffolded by default without prompting
No writes to ~/.conductor/ directory
Next steps output references gruai commands
